text: Match the term "TWO SHORT BLASTS" with the most suitable answers given below

options.text: One prolonged blast followed by two short
One prolonged blast every two minutes

explanation: According to Rule 34 of COLREGs, two short blasts sounded in succession indicate that a vessel altering course to port is intended. This is a maneuvering signal used between vessels to indicate intentions in compliance with the Rules of the Road.
